channel.title: Triage_findings on DefectDojo Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Triage_findings on DefectDojo Documentation

item.title: CVSS Version Support
item.description: DefectDojo supports CVSS metadata on Findings, including the CVSS 4.0 standard. This page describes which CVSS versions are stored end-to-end, where you can enter or view them, and what to expect from parser-side coverage.
